title: Registry Feed Response
description: Response from GET /api/registry/feed. The events array contains cursor-ordered registry events; cursor is the value to pass on the next poll. See specs/registry-change-feed.md.

cursor.description: Pass this value as cursor on the next request to continue polling. Null only when the feed has no events and no prior cursor.

has_more.description: True when more events are immediately available after cursor.
